questions.question_text: Discuss the role & significance of geopolitical features of Northwest Passage and Middle Passage in shaping the history of the US.
Why did President Andrew Jackson sign the Indian Removal Act for the exchange of land? Elaborate with rational arguments.
How the nativist thoughts formed the Know-Nothing political party and became a strong public voice in US? Explain with examples.
Discuss in detail the mainstream agenda of Theodore Roosevelt’s domestic-level Square Deal program.
Discuss in detail how the Iroquoian people and their cultural traits are associated with early American history.
How the strict-constructionist ideas of Jefferson and the loose-constructionist thoughts of Hamilton created major debates in domestic US politics? Provide comprehensive arguments.
